definition: A candle (or series) that closes opposite to the intended directional bias at a point of interest (e.g., fair value gap, order block, swing high/low). In bullish contexts, it is a down-close candle; in bearish contexts, an up-close candle. When price closes through the opposing candle(s), it confirms a change in state of delivery and forms a valid order block or propulsion block, establishing a protected swing for continuation entries.
identification_rules: Locate a consecutive series of same-direction candles (all up-close for a bearish OB, all down-close for a bullish OB) that immediately precede a strong displacement move.

Confirm the Order Block when price closes beyond the last candle in the series in the opposing direction (e.g., a close above the final down-close candle for a bullish OB, or below the final up-close candle for a bearish OB), signaling a Change in the State of Delivery.
Draw the Order Block as a rectangle spanning the body range (high-to-low) of the identified same-direction candle series.
For entries, prefer the mean threshold (midpoint/discount level) of the OB rather than its extreme boundary.
Place the stop-loss at the low of a bullish Order Block or the high of a bearish Order Block (the opposing boundary of the rectangle).

A Propulsion Block is identified when price retests and respects a prior Order Block before continuing in the same direction, effectively stacking one OB on top of another, signaling reinforced institutional interest.
Prefer OBs that align with additional confluences such as the midnight open price, premium/discount of the broader range, or a Fair Value Gap at the same level.
Key session times (02:00–05:00 London, 08:30, 09:30, midnight open New York) frequently coincide with Order Block formation; alignment with these times adds confluence and conviction.
识别一系列同向收盘K线（连续上涨或下跌），该序列出现在价格反转或市场结构转变（MSS）之前
价格随后发生位移（Displacement），收盘穿越该K线序列的开盘价（看涨OB被向下穿越，看跌OB被向上穿越），即确认交付状态改变（CSD）
有效OB必须形成于高时间框架重要水平（如前期摆动高低点、FVG、流动性区域）附近，随机位置的相同形态不构成有效OB
OB通常伴随流动性扫荡：价格先扫除摆动高点（看跌OB）或摆动低点（看涨OB）的流动性，随后反向位移
OB的关键价位为该K线序列的开盘价；K线实体大、影线小时以开盘价为入场参考；实体小、影线大时以影线到开盘价区间（均值阈值/Mean Threshold，即K线实体50%中点）为参考
多根K线组成OB时，使用整个K线组合的范围；在更高时间框架上，多根低时间框架K线可能对应单根K线
在多时间框架分析中，先在高时间框架（日线、4小时）确认OB位置和方向偏差，再在低时间框架（5分钟、1分钟）寻找嵌套OB作为精确入场点
OB应位于折价区（Discount，适合做多）或溢价区（Premium，适合做空），结合斐波那契0.5水平判断
价格回测OB区域时，若收盘未穿透该区域（尊重该水平），则确认OB有效性；若强势穿透则OB可能转变为Breaker Block或Mitigation Block
OB被回测后可演变为推进块（Propulsion Block），在原OB基础上形成更小的新OB，提供额外入场机会
可结合SMT（Smart Money Technique）跨资产分歧、受保护摆动（Protected Swing）、关键时间点（伦敦开盘、纽约开盘8:30/9:30）等进一步确认OB有效性
Confirm directional bias and that a reversal sequence (e.g., change in state of delivery, liquidity sweep) has occurred.
Identify a point of interest (POI) such as a fair value gap, order block, equilibrium of a higher time frame candle, breaker block, or previous range high/low.

In a bullish context, locate down-close (bearish) candle(s) that retrace into the buy-side POI; in a bearish context, locate up-close (bullish) candle(s) that retrace into the sell-side POI. If the retracement is messy, group the entire series as one opposing candle set.

Wait for price to close through the opposing candle series: for bullish, a close above the highs of the down-close candles; for bearish, a close below the lows of the up-close candles. The closure should be decisive and form a new protected swing and order block (or propulsion block if retesting another order block).
If no clear POI is reached, the candle can still qualify only if paired with SMT divergence on a correlated asset.
Locate a displacement move that sweeps a prior swing high/low (liquidity sweep) and shifts market structure.
Identify the last opposing-close candle(s) (down-close for bullish OB, up-close for bearish OB) immediately preceding the displacement.
Validate the order block with a close through the opposing candle series (change in state of delivery), ideally closing beyond the opening price.
Ensure the order block is at a significant point of interest (HTF PD array, fair value gap, liquidity level) and within the discount (longs) or premium (shorts) of the range.
Mark the body range as the OB zone; use the opening price as entry or the mean threshold (50% of body) for tighter risk.
On retest, bodies should not close through the order block; wick penetration alone does not invalidate.
Prefer full-bodied, large candles; avoid weak, small candles during consolidation. If multiple same-direction candles, reference the opening price of the first candle.
前提条件：价格必须先触及或扫过重要价格水平（如高时间框架PD Array、Fair Value Gap、前期Swing High/Low、流动性水平），缺少此条件则不构成有效Order Block
看跌Order Block：识别推动价格到达重要水平前的一根或一系列上涨收盘K线（up-close candles），当后续K线收盘价跌破该系列K线的开盘价时（CISD），确认为有效看跌Order Block
看涨Order Block：识别推动价格到达重要水平前的一根或一系列下跌收盘K线（down-close candles），当后续K线收盘价突破该系列K线的开盘价时（CISD），确认为有效看涨Order Block
多根同向K线时，使用该系列中第一根K线的开盘价作为验证水平，而非最后一根
验证条件为收盘价穿越，仅触及但未收盘穿越不构成有效CISD
优先在CISD发生前等待流动性扫荡（Liquidity Sweep），即价格先扫过附近Buy Side或Sell Side Liquidity后再发生收盘穿越
标记该系列同向K线所覆盖的价格区间为Order Block区域，可进一步计算其50%水平（Mean Threshold）作为更精确的入场参考
若Order Block由另一个Order Block内部形成（价格回撤至前一OB后再次触发CISD），则升级识别为Propulsion Block
在折扣区（低于0.5斐波那契水平）寻找看涨Order Block，在溢价区（高于0.5斐波那契水平）寻找看跌Order Block
在反转序列中，Order Block为第三步确认信号，出现在Liquidity Sweep和Inversion Fair Value Gap之后
低时间框架（1分钟/15分钟）应用：等待价格扫过前摆动高/低点后，找到位移发生前最后一根反向收盘K线作为候选Order Block，结合高时间框架方向偏差确认后使用
trading_implication: Opposing candles provide systematic continuation entry triggers within trending markets. After a reversal is confirmed and price retraces into a point of interest, the opposing candle forms; on its close-through, a protected swing and order block are established. Traders enter in the direction of bias, place stops beyond the opposing candle series high/low, and target expansion with minimum 2R. This approach improves risk-to-reward by waiting for confirmation after the initial reversal, and enables fractal alignment across time frames.
common_mistakes: Entering at the extreme of the OB rather than waiting for price to reach the mean threshold (discount), reducing risk/reward quality.
Treating a Change in the State of Delivery as confirmed before price actually closes beyond the same-direction candle series — an unconfirmed series is not yet a valid OB.
Placing the stop-loss at the individual candle low/high rather than at the boundary of the full Order Block rectangle, which may result in premature stop-outs.
Identifying an Order Block without confirming that a relevant higher time frame PD Array or liquidity level was reached first, leading to low-probability setups.
Using the OB in isolation without checking alignment with premium/discount of the broader range, session timing (kill zones), or higher time frame context.

Confusing a lower time frame Order Block formed during a manipulation move (e.g., 08:30 opposing run) with the primary directional Order Block — the manipulation OB is used for entry refinement, not as the primary bias signal.
Ignoring session context: an Order Block formed outside of London or New York kill zones carries lower conviction.
Failing to recognize a Propulsion Block when a prior OB is retested and holds — missing the stacked institutional interest signal.
未等待CSD（收盘穿越OB开盘价）确认就提前入场，导致交易无效的OB
未确认市场结构转变（MSS）就在OB处交易，忽视OB必须在结构转变前形成的前置条件
将任意反转K线或普通支撑阻力误认为OB，忽视其必须位于高时间框架重要水平附近的要求
OB被完全突破后仍依赖其作为支撑阻力，未识别其已转变为Breaker Block或Mitigation Block
忽视OB所处的折价/溢价区域，在不利价格位置（如溢价区做多）入场
未在多时间框架上确认OB有效性，仅依赖单一时间框架识别导致信号不可靠
止损设置过紧，设在OB边界而非OB极值或受保护摆动点，导致被虚假突破扫出
在OB区域内交易而非等待价格回测后远离该区域的确认
混淆OB与Breaker Block的标记范围（OB标记开盘价水平，Breaker Block标记整个K线范围含影线）
选择扫盘后的小实体K线而非扫盘过程中的大实体K线作为OB
在非趋势环境中使用低概率OB（小实体大影线），应仅在明确趋势中使用
同时标记所有PD array概念导致图表混乱，应专注于OB等少数核心概念并深入掌握
在OB被首次回测时过早移动止损至盈亏平衡点，导致被扫出而错过后续目标
在盘整区域内将K线误识别为OB，盘整区间高低点应作为兴趣点而非OB
未结合流动性扫荡验证OB，缺乏流动性扫荡背景的OB可靠性降低
Entering or treating an opposing candle as valid before price closes through the series (no change in state of delivery confirmed).
Treating a candle as opposing without price first reaching a valid point of interest (e.g., fair value gap, swing high/low sweep).
Confusing the initial reversal entry with a continuation entry; opposing candles are only for continuation after reversal is confirmed.
Forcing an entry without SMT confirmation when the candle did not interact with a POI.
Attempting to combine too many PD arrays, leading to confusion and missed entries.
Expecting expansion off opposing candles after a prolonged trend (e.g., three consecutive expansion days) when a consolidation or reversal is more likely.
Treating opposing candles inside consolidation as a reliable order block; use the range high/low as the POI instead.
Focusing on individual small candles in a messy retracement instead of grouping the entire series as the opposing set.
Chasing a one-directional grind without a qualifying retrace, when no opposing candle has formed.
Not requiring a prior liquidity sweep (turtle soup) or reversal confirmation before validating an opposing candle.
Entering before a confirmed close through opposing candles (no change in state of delivery).
Ignoring higher time frame bias or not aligning with a relevant point of interest.
Using an order block without a confirmed liquidity sweep and market structure shift.
Choosing weak, small-bodied candles instead of the largest full-bodied candle.
Using the opening price entry on a large OB, leading to poor risk-to-reward, instead of the mean threshold.
Treating wick penetration as invalidation when bodies have not closed through.
Misidentifying the OB by using a retracement or consolidation move instead of a genuine displacement.
Taking the OB in premium when seeking longs (or discount for shorts).
Not waiting for a closer continuation OB when the initial OB is too far for acceptable risk-to-reward.
Confusing order blocks with breaker blocks or fair value gaps.
在没有重要价格水平支撑的随机位置识别Order Block，导致无效信号
未等待CISD（收盘价穿过系列K线开盘价）即提前将候选K线区域标记为有效Order Block
价格仅触及但未收盘穿越关键开盘价水平时误判为有效CISD
多根同向K线时，错误使用最后一根K线的开盘价作为验证水平，而非第一根
未等待流动性被扫取（Liquidity Sweep）即将普通K线当作Order Block入场
Order Block范围较大时仍以开盘价入场，导致风险回报比偏低，应改用Mean Threshold
将止损直接置于Order Block另一端而非Swing High/Low，价格轻微Wick即可触发止损
忽略高时间框架方向偏差，在不符合更高时间框架偏差的方向上使用Order Block入场
未结合高时间框架Internal/External Range Liquidity框架确认方向，孤立使用Order Block
价格回测Order Block时未等待低时间框架CISD确认即入场，缺少入场序列验证
将Order Block与Breaker Block混淆：部分描述中Order Block仅标记开盘价水平线，而Breaker Block标记含影线的矩形区域
Order Block不在折扣/溢价区时直接入场，而非等待Mean Threshold或第二次入场机会
回测Order Block时忽略同时形成的Fair Value Gap，错失更精确的入场确认信号
试图同时掌握所有PD Array概念导致分析混乱，建议专注精通单一概念
